exits.description: Optional map of direction (north/south/east/west/up/down) to destination room id.

locked_exits.description: Optional map of direction to the item id of the key required to unlock that exit.

hidden_exits.description: Optional map of direction (north/south/east/west/up/down) to destination room id for secret exits. A hidden exit is omitted from the rendered 'Exits:' line and cannot be walked through with a normal direction command until a player finds it with the SEARCH command; once discovered it becomes a normal, visible, walkable exit for every player until the server restarts. Discovery state is tracked in memory (never persisted), so it is world-scoped and resets on restart. A hidden exit may also be locked (list the same direction under locked_exits): discovery reveals it but does not unlock it.

min_level.description: Optional recommended/minimum level to enter this room. Advisory only: it never blocks movement, it only triggers a warning message to players below this level. Omit for no restriction.

night_description.description: Optional alternate description shown instead of 'description' when the world clock is at night. Omit for no change at night.

light_level.description: Optional ambient light level: 0 = pitch dark, 1 = dim, 2 or higher = naturally lit. Omit for a naturally lit room that needs no carried light. Dark rooms hide their contents from players who carry no sufficient light source; a pitch-dark room (0) requires a light radius of at least 1 (a torch), a dim room (1) requires at least 2 (a lantern).

is_outdoor.description: Optional flag marking the room as exposed to the sky and therefore subject to the world's dynamic weather. Omit or set false for indoor rooms, which never show weather effects.

ambient_messages.description: Optional pool of atmospheric flavour lines the room emits occasionally during play (e.g. dripping water, distant howls). Omit or leave empty for a silent room. The ambient message engine picks one line at a time and delivers it to everyone in the room.
